public_safety.redaction_policy: Fields are removed from payloads rather than hidden in the DOM.
public_safety.aggregate_policy: Public aggregates must be irreversible and must not encode withheld quantities.
public_safety.real_telemetry_policy: Real telemetry requires private authenticated server-side authorization and is not part of this static fixture.

panel_state_legend.READY: Real, cleared, recruiter-safe data is present and current.
panel_state_legend.PARTIAL: Some cleared data is present; absent data is declared.
panel_state_legend.MISSING: The data is unavailable to this surface.
panel_state_legend.GATED: Real data belongs behind the future private authenticated cockpit.
panel_state_legend.PROPRIETARY_REDACTED: A value exists but is withheld by the proprietary boundary.
panel_state_legend.DEMO_SYNTHETIC: The displayed data is synthetic and for demonstration only.

flight_recorder.label: DEMO_SYNTHETIC flight recorder
flight_recorder.purpose: Show coarse cockpit health language without exposing real events.

coarse_events.label: Synthetic intake heartbeat
coarse_events.description: Demonstrates that a future panel can show coarse liveness without event rows.

coarse_events.label: Synthetic validation gate observed
coarse_events.description: Shows process state only; no trigger, threshold, instrument, or timestamp is present.

coarse_events.label: Synthetic export sealed
coarse_events.description: Represents a public-safe publication boundary, not an engine event.

research_ledger.label: DEMO_SYNTHETIC research ledger shell
research_ledger.purpose: Show the research lifecycle as methodology, not real results.

lifecycle.description: A hypothesis is recorded before evaluation.
A gate is represented as a process step only.
Public output is checked before publication.
Only the lifecycle shell is shown publicly.

volatility_topology.label: DEMO_SYNTHETIC volatility topology
volatility_topology.purpose: Demonstrate an options-native substrate on an illustrative universe.

private_tools.label: GATED private tools placeholder
private_tools.purpose: Reserve space for future authenticated tools without shipping payload.

private_real_telemetry.label: GATED real telemetry placeholder
private_real_telemetry.purpose: Declare that real telemetry is out of scope for the public static contract.
